summary: Iteration 54 — Web-Portal Salary Process (base, no PF/ESIC/TDS). Backend + Frontend both validated. 7/7 pytest cases pass. Frontend /salary-run renders 'Base pay parameters' section with only 'OT ×' input plus the compliance hint, results table has exactly the 16 expected columns (Code..Net), no PF/ESI/TDS columns anywhere. CSV/PDF/Reprocess/Push payslips actions render. advance_balance persisted via PATCH /admin/user-role and flows into salary-run rows (verified: advance=500 → total_deduction=500 → net = gross-500).
critical_code_review_comments: utils/salary_run.py is clean & modular (compute + CSV + PDF in one file, ~390 lines). No PF/ESI/TDS references found in code — silently ignores legacy body keys via DEFAULT_DEDUCTION_CFG whitelist ({ot_multiplier}).
POST /admin/salary-runs correctly scopes company_admin to their own company; super_admin can pass company_id or omit for all.
generate-payslips replaces existing (employee, month) slip → idempotent. Good.
salary-run.tsx: hint copy about compliance is accurate. All 16 column headers match spec exactly.
Minor: /api/admin/salary-runs response includes `_id` (Mongo ObjectId) is prevented by projection `{_id: 0}` in list/get. Confirmed via test — no _id leak.
seed_data_creation: Test created 1 throwaway employee (via OTP + PATCH user-role) with advance_balance=500 for the advance-flow test; cleaned up to advance=0 at end of test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth: OTP dev mode (POST /api/auth/otp/request → dev_code) for sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com. Token key in localStorage is 'llc_session_token'. Companies endpoint is /api/companies (not /admin/companies). /api/admin/employees returns both admins and employees mixed — filter by role==employee for salary tests. Backend uses `session_token` in verify response (not `token`).
rca_of_issue: N/A — first-pass iteration, feature works as spec'd.
